name: golang-github-akavel-rsrc-dev
title: golang-github-akavel-rsrc-dev
summary: Go library for embedding binary resources in executables
description:
Go library for embedding binary resources in executables
rsrc is a Go library based on ideas presented by Minux. It will embed
specified binary resources in the .rsrc section of the executable, and
this can be detected automatically by 'go build'.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-akavel-rsrc-dev because Go library for embedding binary resources in executables.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-akavel-rsrc-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-akavel-rsrc-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-akavel-rsrc-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
